description_long: This is a grave monument featuring a bronze bust of a man mounted atop a tall, rectangular stone pedestal. The pedestal is inscribed with the name 'HEGEL' on its front face and stands on a multi-tiered stone base. The entire monument is enclosed by a decorative wrought iron fence with pointed finials, forming a square perimeter around the grave. The ground within the fence is covered with moss and scattered leaves, giving it an aged and weathered appearance. The bust is rendered in a greenish patina, typical of aged bronze, while the pedestal and base are made of light gray stone. The monument is designed to be a prominent and respectful memorial within a cemetery or park setting.
description: A bronze bust of a man on a tall stone pedestal inscribed 'HEGEL', surrounded by a decorative wrought iron fence and mossy ground.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bronze bust, the inscribed name 'HEGEL' on the pedestal, and the full iron fence enclosure.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the bust and the depth of the stone pedestal, with the iron fence visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the bust and pedestal, with no inscriptions visible and the iron fence enclosing the area.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the opposite profile of the bust and pedestal, with the iron fence and mossy ground inside.
